status.description: completed = thorough review with all safe_auto fixes applied. partial = incomplete review. failed = no meaningful review produced.

findings.description: All findings from the review, including applied fixes.

title.description: Short issue title, 10 words or fewer.

line.description: Line number of the finding (approximate is OK).

autofix_class.description: safe_auto=applied directly. gated_auto=needs approval. manual=needs design. advisory=report only.

confidence.description: Confidence that this is a real issue (0.0-1.0).

why_it_matters.description: Impact of the issue if not addressed.

suggested_fix.description: Suggested fix if obvious and correct. null if needs design decision.

applied.description: true if this safe_auto fix was applied to the file. false for all other classes.

files_modified.description: Files modified by applied safe_auto fixes. Empty if report-only or no fixes applied.

summary.description: One-paragraph description of overall code quality and key concerns.

testing_gaps.description: Missing tests or weak coverage areas identified.

residual_risks.description: gated_auto and manual concerns requiring human attention.
